giai_thich: call sb up = give sb a ring: gọi điện cho ai

cau_hoi: Because of heavy rain, the game was ........................................ for a few days.
giai_thich: put off: trì hoãn

cau_hoi: What may happen if John will not arrive in time?
giai_thich: turn up = arrive: đến nơi

cau_hoi: Johnny sometimes visits his grandparents in the countryside.
giai_thich: call on = visit: ghé thăm

cau_hoi: I do not use those things any more. You can ........................................ them away.
giai_thich: throw away: vứt đi

cau_hoi: At the station, we often see the sign “........................................ for pickpockets”.
giai_thich: watch out for: coi chừng, cảnh giác

cau_hoi: The passengers had to wait because the plane ........................................ off one hour late.
giai_thich: take off: (máy bay) cất cánh

cau_hoi: He ........................................ on many subjects at the meeting.
giai_thich: held forth: nói hăng hái/đề cập nhiều về chủ đề gì

cau_hoi: If I had not held him ........................................ , he would have beaten you soundly.
giai_thich: hold sb back: ngăn cản ai lại

cau_hoi: Please let me ........................................ . I promise not to do it again.
giai_thich: let sb off: tha thứ, không trừng phạt

cau_hoi: He knows where the boy was hiding but he didn’t let ........................................ .
giai_thich: let on: tiết lộ bí mật

cau_hoi: He promised to deliver the stuff today and has let us ........................................ again.
giai_thich: let sb down: làm ai thất vọng
let up: ngớt mưa, giảm cường độ
hold up: làm tắc nghẽn giao thông

cau_hoi: Because of the heavy rain, today the meeting will be held ........................................ until next week.
giai_thich: hold over: hoãn lại

cau_hoi: I would have been here sooner but the rain kept me ........................................ .
giai_thich: keep back: cản trở, giữ lại
keep away from: tránh xa khỏi cái gì

cau_hoi: It is the most important to keep ........................................ your neighbors.
giai_thich: keep in with sb: hòa thuận với ai

cau_hoi: He promised to keep ........................................ us while he was abroad.
giai_thich: keep in touch with: giữ liên lạc

cau_hoi: I took ........................................ him at once, and we have been friends over since.
giai_thich: take to sb: bắt đầu thích ai đó

cau_hoi: Our teacher told us that if we don’t ........................................ the environment, our grandchildren may not even be able to carry on living.
giai_thich: look after: chăm sóc, bảo vệ môi trường

cau_hoi: He may have deceived you, but he didn’t take me ........................................
giai_thich: take sb in: lừa gạt ai
make out: hiểu được
make for: tiến về hướng
pass off: mất dần, biến mất

cau_hoi: We must make ........................................ some stories to explain our absence.
giai_thich: make up: bịa đặt chuyện

cau_hoi: Stephen always wanted to be an actor when he ........................................ up.
giai_thich: grow up: trưởng thành

cau_hoi: The bus only stops here to ........................................ passengers.
giai_thich: pick up: đón khách

cau_hoi: If anything urgent comes ........................................ , you can contact me at this number.
giai_thich: come up: nảy sinh, xảy ra bất ngờ

cau_hoi: Your daughter’s just started work, hasn’t she? How’s she getting ........................................ ?
giai_thich: get on: tiến triển công việc

cau_hoi: We had to turn ........................................ their invitation to lunch as we had a previous appointment .
giai_thich: turn down: từ chối lời mời
die of + bệnh: chết vì bệnh gì

cau_hoi: The elevator is not running today. It is ........................................ order.
giai_thich: out of order: bị hỏng
explain to sb: giải thích cho ai

cau_hoi: Who will ........................................ the children while you go out to work?
giai_thich: look after: chăm sóc trẻ

cau_hoi: If you want to join this club, you must ........................................ this application form.
giai_thich: fill in: điền vào mẫu đơn

cau_hoi: The water company will have to ........................................ off water supplies while repairs to the pipes are carried ........................................ .
giai_thich: cut off: cắt nước / carry out: tiến hành sửa chữa

cau_hoi: They were 30 minutes later because their car ........................................ down.
giai_thich: break down: xe bị hỏng
be up to sb: tùy ai quyết định / make up one's mind: quyết định

cau_hoi: Do you want to stop in this town, or shall we ........................................ ?
giai_thich: go on: tiếp tục đi tiếp
